schema.name: Edit mode
schema.description: Allow users to edit node properties from views and persist changes to the underlying data.

schema.name: View modes
schema.description: Choose which layout types can be created when building views (Graph, Hierarchy, Reference Model, Layered Lineage).

schema.name: Signup
schema.description: Allow new users to create an account from the login page (self-registration).

schema.name: Trace
schema.description: Enable lineage trace in graph and context views (trace upstream/downstream from a node).

experimentalNotice.title: Early access
experimentalNotice.message: This area is in early access. Your choices are saved, but we're still wiring these options into the rest of the product. You may not see behaviour changes until a future update.
